ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Confirm Undo
ast.target: 确认撤销

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which heading from your template should the todos go under
ast.target: 待办事项应放在模板中的哪个标题下

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you have empty todos, they will not be rolled over to the next day.
ast.target: 如果您有空的待办事项，它们将不会被滚动到下一天。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, only the actual todos are rolled over. If you add nested Markdown-elements beneath your todos, these are not rolled over but stay in place, possibly altering the logic of your previous note. This setting allows for also migrating the nested elements.
ast.target: 默认情况下，只有实际的待办事项会被滚动。如果您在待办事项下添加了嵌套的Markdown元素，这些元素不会被滚动，而是留在原处，可能会改变您之前笔记的逻辑。此设置允许同时迁移嵌套元素。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the plugin will automatically rollover todos when you open a daily note.
ast.target: 如果启用，插件将在您打开每日笔记时自动滚动待办事项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Characters that represent done status in checkboxes. Default is "xX-". Add any characters that should be considered as marking a task complete.
ast.target: 表示复选框完成状态的字符。默认为\"xX-\"。添加任何应被视为标记任务完成的字符。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Template heading
ast.target: 模板标题

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Delete todos from previous day
ast.target: 从前一天删除待办事项

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Remove empty todos in rollover
ast.target: 在滚动时移除空的待办事项

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Roll over children of todos
ast.target: 滚动待办事项的子项

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Automatic rollover on daily note open
ast.target: 打开每日笔记时自动滚动

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Done status markers
ast.target: 完成状态标记符

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to read the daily note template
ast.target: 读取每日笔记模板失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to create new file.
ast.target: 无法创建新文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: RolloverTodosPlugin unable to rollover unfinished todos: Please enable Daily Notes, or Periodic Notes (with daily notes enabled).
ast.target: RolloverTodosPlugin无法滚动未完成的待办事项：请启用“每日笔记”或“周期性笔记”（并启用每日笔记）。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rollover Todos Now
ast.target: 立即滚动待办事项

ast.name: name
ast.source: Undo last rollover
ast.target: 撤销上次滚动

ast.name: none
ast.source: None
ast.target: 无

ast.name: text
ast.source: Undo last rollover
ast.target: 撤销上次滚动

ast.name: text
ast.source: A single rollover command can be undone, which will load the state of the two files modified (or 1 if the delete option is toggled off) before the rollover first occurred. Any text you may have added from those file(s) during that time may be deleted.
ast.target: 可以撤销单个滚动操作，这将加载滚动首次发生前两个文件（或如果关闭了删除选项则为1个文件）的状态。在此期间您可能从这些文件中添加的任何文本可能会被删除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note that rollover actions can only be undone for up to 2 minutes after the command occurred, and will be removed from history if the app closes.
ast.target: 请注意，滚动操作只能在命令发生后最多2分钟内撤销，如果应用关闭，将从历史记录中移除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Changes made with undo:
ast.target: 撤销所做的更改：
